phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Impressionist gallery is
phrases.text_local: Où se trouve la galerie des Impressionnistes ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo suh TROOV lah gal-REE day zahn-pres-yoh-NEEST
phrases.cultural_note: Lyon's Musée des Beaux-Arts is considered the second most important fine arts museum in France after the Louvre. Its Impressionist collection is outstanding.

responses.english: On the second floor, right wing.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about the cloistered garden inside
phrases.text_local: Est-ce que le jardin intérieur est accessible aux visiteurs ?
phrases.pronunciation: es-kuh luh zhar-DEHN an-tay-RYUR eh ak-ses-EEBL oh vee-zee-TUR
phrases.cultural_note: The museum occupies a former Benedictine convent. Its peaceful cloistered garden is open during museum hours and is a lovely spot to rest between galleries.

responses.english: In the centre of the building, ground floor.
responses.phonetic: oh SAHN-truh doo bah-tee-MAHN, oh ray-duh-shoh-SAY
responses.local: Au centre du bâtiment, au rez-de-chaussée.

phrases.text_local: Pourriez-vous me donner un plan du musée ?
phrases.pronunciation: poo-ryay-VOO muh doh-NAY uhn PLAHN doo moo-ZAY
phrases.cultural_note: The museum is vast, spread across five themed departments: Antiquities, Medieval and Renaissance, Paintings, Sculptures, and Objets d'Art. A map is essential.

phrases.text_local: Y a-t-il des jours d'entrée gratuite ?
phrases.pronunciation: ee ah-TEEL day ZHOOR dahn-TRAY grah-TWEET
phrases.cultural_note: Entry to the museum is free on the first Sunday of every month. Young visitors under 18 and EU residents under 26 always enter free of charge.

responses.english: The first Sunday of the month.

phrases.intent_en: Ask to check a bag in the cloakroom
phrases.text_local: Puis-je déposer mon sac au vestiaire ?
phrases.pronunciation: pwee-zhuh day-poh-ZAY mohn SAK oh ves-TYAIR
phrases.cultural_note: Large bags must be left at the cloakroom. Lockers are free of charge. Photography without flash is generally permitted in permanent galleries.

responses.english: Yes, the cloakroom is at the entrance.
responses.phonetic: wee, luh ves-TYEHR eh ah lahn-TRAY
responses.local: Oui, le vestiaire est à l'entrée.
